{ "name": "brianium/paratest", "description": "Parallel testing for PHP", "license": "MIT", "type": "library", "keywords": [ "testing", "PHPUnit", "concurrent", "parallel" ], "authors": [ { "name": "Brian Scaturro", "email": "scaturrob@gmail.com", "role": "Developer" }, { "name": "Filippo Tessarotto", "email": "zoeslam@gmail.com", "role": "Developer" } ], "homepage": "https://github.com/paratestphp/paratest", "funding": [ { "type": "github", "url": "https://github.com/sponsors/Slamdunk" }, { "type": "paypal", "url": "https://paypal.me/filippotessarotto" } ], "require": { "php": "~8.3.0 || ~8.4.0 || ~8.5.0", "ext-dom": "*", "ext-pcre": "*", "ext-reflection": "*", "ext-simplexml": "*", "fidry/cpu-core-counter": "^1.3.0", "jean85/pretty-package-versions": "^2.1.1", "phpunit/php-code-coverage": "^12.5.3 || ^13.0.1", "phpunit/php-file-iterator": "^6.0.1 || ^7", "phpunit/php-timer": "^8 || ^9", "phpunit/phpunit": "^12.5.9 || ^13", "sebastian/environment": "^8.0.3 || ^9", "symfony/console": "^7.4.4 || ^8.0.4", "symfony/process": "^7.4.5 || ^8.0.5" }, "require-dev": { "ext-pcntl": "*", "ext-pcov": "*", "ext-posix": "*", "doctrine/coding-standard": "^14.0.0", "phpstan/phpstan": "^2.1.38", "phpstan/phpstan-deprecation-rules": "^2.0.3", "phpstan/phpstan-phpunit": "^2.0.12", "phpstan/phpstan-strict-rules": "^2.0.8", "symfony/filesystem": "^7.4.0 || ^8.0.1" }, "autoload": { "psr-4": { "ParaTest\\": [ "src/" ] } }, "autoload-dev": { "psr-4": { "ParaTest\\Tests\\": "test/" } }, "bin": [ "bin/paratest", "bin/paratest_for_phpstorm" ], "config": { "allow-plugins": { "composer/package-versions-deprecated": true, "dealerdirect/phpcodesniffer-composer-installer": true, "infection/extension-installer": true }, "sort-packages": true } }
